title: FIX: GitHub Pages Path Resolution - AVIF Images Return 404
problem: Gallery deployed to https://swipswaps.github.io/balloon-color-planner/ but relative paths ./assets/images/ resolve to wrong URL root
root_cause: GitHub Pages serves repo at /balloon-color-planner/ subdirectory. Relative paths don't account for this prefix.
solution: Use absolute paths /balloon-color-planner/assets/images/ in gallery-data.js + runtime path normalization for local dev
applicable_rules: RULE_7: EVIDENCE_BEFORE_ASSERTION - Test locally BEFORE committing
RULE_16: COMPLETE_WORKFLOW_TESTING - Local test + GitHub Pages verification
RULE_6: KNOWN_WORKING_CODE_ONLY - Path normalization proven pattern

implementation.step_3: Add path normalization script to balloon-planner/index-photo.html
implementation.step_4: Test locally - verify all 190 images load and color filtering works
implementation.step_6: Push to GitHub to trigger GitHub Actions deployment

local_dev: No 404 errors in browser Network tab
github_pages: All images load with HTTP 200 status
Gallery displays smooth AVIF edges (no blocky artifacts)

files_changed: balloon-planner/index-photo.html - Added path normalization IIFE script
